sql:
WITH EVENTS_20210119 AS (
    SELECT
        user_pseudo_id,
        SUM(
            IFNULL(
                UNNEST(
                    ARRAY(SELECT value.int_value FROM UNNEST(event_params) WHERE key = 'engagement_time_msec')
                ),
                0
            )
        ) AS total_engagement_time
    FROM
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_*`
    WHERE
        _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20210101' AND '20210107'
        AND event_name = 'user_engagement'
    GROUP BY
        user_pseudo_id
)
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS distinct_users_with_positive_engagement
FROM
    EVENTS_20210119
WHERE
    total_engagement_time > 0
HAVING
    total_engagement_time IN (
        SELECT
            total_engagement_time
        FROM
            EVENTS_20210119
        WHERE
            total_engagement_time <= 0
    );

    SELECT
        user_pseudo_id,
        SUM(
            IFNULL(
                UNNEST(
                    ARRAY(SELECT value.int_value FROM UNNEST(event_params) WHERE key = 'engagement_time_msec')
                ),
                0
            )
        ) AS total_engagement_time
    FROM
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_*`
    WHERE
        _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20210101' AND '20210107'
        AND event_name = 'user_engagement'
    GROUP BY
        user_pseudo_id
)
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS distinct_users_with_positive_engagement
FROM
    Engagements
WHERE
    total_engagement_time > 0
HAVING
    total_engagement_time IN (
        SELECT
            total_engagement_time
        FROM
            Engagements
        WHERE
            total_engagement_time <= 0
    );

sql:
WITH purchases AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    product.v2ProductName,
    SUM(product.productRevenue) AS revenue
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*`
  CROSS JOIN 
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit
  CROSS JOIN 
    UNNEST(hit.product) AS product
  WHERE 
    product.v2ProductName = 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId, product.v2ProductName
),
other_purchases AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    product.v2ProductName,
    SUM(product.productRevenue) AS revenue
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*`
  CROSS JOIN 
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit
  CROSS JOIN 
    UNNEST(hit.product) AS product
  WHERE 
    product.v2ProductName != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId, product.v2ProductName
)
SELECT 
  op.v2ProductName,
  SUM(op.revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM 
  other_purchases op
JOIN 
  purchases p ON op.fullVisitorId = p.fullVisitorId
GROUP BY 
  op.v2ProductName
ORDER BY 
  total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.channelGrouping,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS total_revenue
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231'
    AND trafficSource.channelGrouping IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.channelGrouping,
    month
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    channelGrouping,
    MAX(total_revenue) AS device,
    MIN(total_revenue) AS socialEngagementType
  FROM
    GA_SESSIONS_20161019
  GROUP BY
    channelGrouping
)
SELECT
  m.channelGrouping,
  ROUND(m.device - m.socialEngagementType, 2) AS revenue_difference_millions
FROM
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019 m;
original_sql:
WITH MonthlyRevenue AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.campaign,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS total_revenue
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231'
    AND trafficSource.campaign IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.campaign,
    month
),
MaxMinRevenue AS (
  SELECT
    campaign,
    MAX(total_revenue) AS max_revenue,
    MIN(total_revenue) AS min_revenue
  FROM
    MonthlyRevenue
  GROUP BY
    campaign
)
SELECT
  m.campaign,
  ROUND(m.max_revenue - m.min_revenue, 2) AS revenue_difference_millions
FROM
  MaxMinRevenue m;

sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_visit_date
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201702*`
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
),
FirstTransaction AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_transaction_date,
    device.deviceCategory AS device_category
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201702*`
  WHERE 
    totals.transactions > 0
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId, device.deviceCategory
)
SELECT 
  fv.fullVisitorId,
  DATE_DIFF(ft.first_transaction_date, fv.first_visit_date, DAY) AS days_elapsed,
  ft.device_category
FROM 
  FirstVisit fv
JOIN 
  FirstTransaction ft ON fv.fullVisitorId = ft.fullVisitorId;

sql:
WITH GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.trafficSource,
    SUM(SAFE_CAST(hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath AS NUMERIC)) * 
      SUM(SAFE_CAST(totals.transactionRevenue AS NUMERIC)) / 1000000 AS totals
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630'
    AND hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath IS NOT NULL
    AND totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.trafficSource
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource,
    MAX(totals) AS customDimensions
  FROM
    GA_SESSIONS_20161019
)
SELECT
  t.trafficSource,
  t.customDimensions,
  MAX(r.totals) AS max_weekly_revenue_millions,
  MAX(CASE WHEN DATE_TRUNC(r.date, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(t.date, MONTH) THEN r.totals END) AS max_monthly_revenue_millions
FROM
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019 t
JOIN
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019 r ON t.trafficSource = r.trafficSource
GROUP BY
  t.trafficSource, t.customDimensions;
original_sql:
WITH RevenueByTrafficSource AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.source,
    SUM(SAFE_CAST(hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath AS NUMERIC)) * 
      SUM(SAFE_CAST(totals.transactionRevenue AS NUMERIC)) / 1000000 AS total_revenue_millions
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630'
    AND hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath IS NOT NULL
    AND totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.source
),
TopTrafficSource AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    MAX(total_revenue_millions) AS max_daily_revenue_millions
  FROM
    RevenueByTrafficSource
)
SELECT
  t.source,
  t.max_daily_revenue_millions,
  MAX(r.total_revenue_millions) AS max_weekly_revenue_millions,
  MAX(CASE WHEN DATE_TRUNC(r.date, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(t.date, MONTH) THEN r.total_revenue_millions END) AS max_monthly_revenue_millions
FROM
  TopTrafficSource t
JOIN
  RevenueByTrafficSource r ON t.source = r.source
GROUP BY
  t.source, t.max_daily_revenue_millions;

sql:
WITH GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), geoNetwork) AS geoNetwork,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_visitors,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions IS NULL AND totals.productRevenue IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_visitors,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions >= 1 THEN totals.pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_pageviews,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions IS NULL AND totals.productRevenue IS NULL THEN totals.pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731'
    AND totals.pageviews IS NOT NULL
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    geoNetwork,
    AVG(purchase_pageviews / purchase_visitors) AS visitStartTime
  FROM
    GA_SESSIONS_20161019
  GROUP BY
    geoNetwork
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    geoNetwork,
    AVG(non_purchase_pageviews / non_purchase_visitors) AS channelGrouping
  FROM
    GA_SESSIONS_20161019
  GROUP BY
    geoNetwork
)
SELECT
  pd.geoNetwork,
  pd.visitStartTime,
  npd.channelGrouping
FROM
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019 pd
JOIN
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019 npd
ON
  pd.geoNetwork = npd.geoNetwork;
original_sql:
WITH monthly_data AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_visitors,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions IS NULL AND totals.productRevenue IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_visitors,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions >= 1 THEN totals.pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_pageviews,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions IS NULL AND totals.productRevenue IS NULL THEN totals.pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731'
    AND totals.pageviews IS NOT NULL
),
purchase_avg_pageviews AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    AVG(purchase_pageviews / purchase_visitors) AS avg_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    monthly_data
  GROUP BY
    month
),
non_purchase_avg_pageviews AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    AVG(non_purchase_pageviews / non_purchase_visitors) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    monthly_data
  GROUP BY
    month
)
SELECT
  pd.month,
  pd.avg_purchase_pageviews,
  npd.avg_non_purchase_pageviews
FROM
  purchase_avg_pageviews pd
JOIN
  non_purchase_avg_pageviews npd
ON
  pd.month = npd.month;

sql:
SELECT 
    p.productSKU,
    SUM(p.productQuantity) AS total_quantity_purchased
FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*` s
JOIN 
    UNNEST(s.hits) h ON TRUE
JOIN 
    UNNEST(h.product) p ON TRUE
WHERE 
    p.productCategory = 'Products'
    AND p.productName NOT LIKE '%YouTube%'
GROUP BY 
    p.productSKU
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_purchased DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH home_page_visits AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(CASE WHEN page.pagePath = '/home' THEN hitNumber END) AS home_hit_number,
    MAX(CASE WHEN page.pagePath LIKE '/home%' THEN hitNumber END) AS last_home_hit_number
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201701*`,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '01' AND '31'
    AND trafficSource.campaign LIKE '%Data Share%'
    AND page.pagePath LIKE '/home%'
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
next_pages AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    home_hit_number,
    last_home_hit_number,
    LEAD(page.pagePath) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_path,
    LEAD(hit.time) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_time
  FROM
    home_page_visits,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    hitNumber > last_home_hit_number
)
SELECT
  next_page_path,
  MAX(next_page_time - hit.time) AS max_time_on_home_page
FROM
  next_pages,
  UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
  UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
WHERE
  page.pagePath = '/home'
GROUP BY
  next_page_path
ORDER BY
  max_time_on_home_page DESC
LIMIT 1;

  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(CASE WHEN page.pagePath = '/home' THEN hitNumber END) AS home_hit_number,
    MAX(CASE WHEN page.pagePath LIKE '/home%' THEN hitNumber END) AS last_home_hit_number
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201701*`,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '01' AND '31'
    AND trafficSource.campaign LIKE '%Data Share%'
    AND page.pagePath LIKE '/home%'
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
next_pages AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    home_hit_number,
    last_home_hit_number,
    LEAD(page.pagePath) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_path,
    LEAD(hit.time) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_time
  FROM
    home_page_visits,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    hitNumber > last_home_hit_number
)
SELECT
  next_page_path,
  MAX(next_page_time - hit.time) AS max_time_on_home_page
FROM
  next_pages,
  UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
  UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
WHERE
  page.pagePath = '/home'
GROUP BY
  next_page_path
ORDER BY
  max_time_on_home_page DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    fullVisitorId,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_pageviews,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions = 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170731'
    AND pageviews IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    month, fullVisitorId
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    SUM(purchase_pageviews) AS total_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_purchase_visitors,
    SUM(non_purchase_pageviews) AS total_non_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_non_purchase_visitors
  FROM
    GA_SESSIONS_20161019
  GROUP BY
    month
)
SELECT
  month,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_purchase_pageviews, num_purchase_visitors) AS avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_non_purchase_pageviews, num_non_purchase_visitors) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019;
original_sql:
WITH monthly_data AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    fullVisitorId,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_pageviews,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions = 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170731'
    AND pageviews IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    month, fullVisitorId
),
monthly_totals AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    SUM(purchase_pageviews) AS total_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_purchase_visitors,
    SUM(non_purchase_pageviews) AS total_non_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_non_purchase_visitors
  FROM
    monthly_data
  GROUP BY
    month
)
SELECT
  month,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_purchase_pageviews, num_purchase_visitors) AS avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_non_purchase_pageviews, num_non_purchase_visitors) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM
  monthly_totals;

sql:
WITH GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(visitStartTime) AS visitStartTime
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MAX(CASE WHEN device.isMobile THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS visitStartTime,
    MAX(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS visitStartTime
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
  f.fullVisitorId,
  DATEDIFF(
    COALESCE(l.visitStartTime, l.visitStartTime), 
    f.visitStartTime
  ) AS max_days_between_first_visit_and_last_event
FROM 
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019 f
JOIN 
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019 l ON f.fullVisitorId = l.fullVisitorId
WHERE 
  l.visitStartTime IS NOT NULL OR l.visitStartTime IS NOT NULL;
original_sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(visitStartTime) AS first_visit_time
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
),
LastEvent AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MAX(CASE WHEN device.isMobile THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS last_mobile_visit_time,
    MAX(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS first_transaction_time
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
  f.fullVisitorId,
  DATEDIFF(
    COALESCE(l.last_mobile_visit_time, l.first_transaction_time), 
    f.first_visit_time
  ) AS max_days_between_first_visit_and_last_event
FROM 
  FirstVisit f
JOIN 
  LastEvent l ON f.fullVisitorId = l.fullVisitorId
WHERE 
  l.last_mobile_visit_time IS NOT NULL OR l.first_transaction_time IS NOT NULL;
